reviews.comment:
Bello lugar, limpieza. Tal vezcdeberian atender mejor el expendio de combustible. Algo lentos y dispersos.
Si mejoran, podrían lograr a mi criterio la máxima nota

(Translated by Google)
Beautiful place, clean. Perhaps they should improve the fuel service. It's a bit slow and disorganized.
If they improve, in my opinion, they could achieve the highest rating.
